title: WYSWYG 1500PCS Classic Building Bricks Set for Kids, Multicolor Blocks, Compatible with Construction Building Blocks, ABS Construction Bricks, Educational Toy for Ages 6+, Stimulates Creativity.
features: 1500PCS Classic Building Bricks Set for Kids: This 1500PCS classic building bricks set is perfect for children aged 6+ who love to build and create, offering a large selection of colorful bricks and blocks for endless construction possibilities.

Compatible with Construction Building Blocks: These building bricks are compatible with construction building blocks, allowing your child to combine this set with other collections for even bigger, more complex building projects.
Safe and Durable ABS Material: Made from non-toxic ABS plastic, the blocks are safe, durable, and built to withstand hours of creative play, giving parents peace of mind.

Stimulates Creativity and Problem-Solving: The 1500PCS set offers an expanded opportunity for children to explore problem-solving, improve their fine motor skills, and foster their creativity through hands-on play.
Multicolor Blocks for Visual Stimulation: With a wide range of multicolor blocks, this set enhances visual learning, making building even more exciting and promoting cognitive development.
description: From the brand Previous page As a representative of emerging toy brands, WYSWYG officially announced its arrival to the world as a brand in 2018 and remained a high selling brand in the industry for the next few years! With this systematic and fun thrust, we have been committed to the holistic development of toys as well as the compatibility of each different accessory. Different Play Style Blocks Various Toys Are the building bricks made from high-quality ABS plastic? We can confirm that the building bricks are made from high-quality ABS plastic. Are there any additional accessories or add-ons available for purchase to complement this set? Yes, there are plenty of additional accessories available for purchase to complement this set. What is the return policy for these building blocks if they are not suitable for my child? The return policy for these building blocks is very convenient! You can return them within 45 days for any reason. Next page
